--ar.purpose: control aspect ratio and composition framing
--ar.default_note: leave unset only when final delivery ratio is not decided

use_when: text rendering should be more literal

--stylize.purpose: control how much default model styling is applied
--stylize.default_note: treat it as low, medium, and high bands during planning
avoid_when: the model keeps overriding the brief

--chaos.purpose: increase result variation inside one run

use_when: a clear break from default taste is needed
direction should be checked before spending more cost
avoid_when: the task is already in finalization

--repeat.purpose: run the same prompt multiple times for batch ideation
use_when: the prompt is already stable enough to duplicate
avoid_when: dirty prompts that are not yet validated

--exp.purpose: increase experimental creative push in supported modern model routes
use_when: supported V7 or V8.1 tasks need extra model invention
avoid_when: Omni influence is the main priority
multi-word phrases may be split dangerously
the desired positive replacement can be written directly

--q.purpose: control first-pass quality and GPU cost

use_when: a prior direction should be reproduced for comparison
avoid_when: used as a substitute for real subject consistency

use_when: image prompt influence is too weak

--sref.purpose: attach a style reference image or code
use_when: style unification is the main goal
avoid_when: subject identity is the main problem

use_when: style reference influence is too weak

--sv.purpose: switch the Style Reference model version explicitly
use_when: style reference behavior should be pinned intentionally
avoid_when: there is no reason to override the default style reference model
subject is already stable and style is the real issue

--p.purpose: attach a personalization or moodboard profile
use_when: long-term taste can be injected safely
the project allows personal style help
avoid_when: the project style is tightly client-bound

--motion.purpose: control how much movement the video should introduce

--loop.purpose: reuse the starting frame as the ending frame
avoid_when: a distinct end frame should be used

--end.purpose: set a dedicated ending frame image for video generation
use_when: the motion should land on a different final frame

--bs.purpose: control how many video variants are generated from one prompt
avoid_when: the task only needs one controlled result

use_when: the project requires a fixed version
the live site and the default environment differ
avoid_when: there is no real reason to override the live environment

--stop.purpose: end generation early on legacy routes for a softer unfinished render
use_when: an intentional V6-or-earlier legacy workflow is requested

character_sheet_clean.goal: produce a clean full-body character sheet

colorway_locked.goal: test one readable colorway on a locked base design

poster_converge.goal: converge toward a usable poster direction

product_clean.goal: produce a cleaner commercial product visual

reference_driven_scene.goal: use a reference image to stabilize scene semantics

image_edit_local_fix.goal: keep the current image structure and change only the selected area or canvas bounds

video_clip_loop.goal: turn a stable starting frame into a controlled short clip

style_system_distill.goal: distill a reusable style code or shortlist style-code candidates

final_delivery.goal: finish when the direction is already locked

compatibility_warnings: Moodboards should not be planned together with --sv or --sw
Omni Reference is not compatible with --q 4
Omni Reference is not compatible with Fast Mode, Draft Mode, or Conversational Mode
Some edit flows may require removing --oref or --ow first
Seed is not a true subject consistency tool
Seed locking is not reliable in Turbo mode
Image-only prompts are not compatible with --stylize or --weird
Video generations only accept --motion low/high, --raw, --loop, --end, and --bs
Video generation automatically drops the original image prompt parameters
V8.1 Alpha should not be planned with --q, --no, or Omni Reference
Pan, Zoom Out, Editor, and Retexture on V7/V8.1 still route through the V6.1 edit chain
--stop is legacy-only and should not be planned for V7, V8.1 Alpha, or Niji 7
Repeat is stripped from finished prompts and must be added again on reruns
